name: Depth-Refracted Liquid Stained Glass
description: Polar facet refraction with chromatic edge dispersion per depth edge, temporal caustic flicker, audio-driven refraction strength, and depth-aware bevel normals. Fixed float-modulus bug.

params.name: Facet Count
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Bevel Width
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Temporal Drift
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Chromatic Amount
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
